titleStmt.title: SII 7.248: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 248. (A.R. No. 71-A of 1901). ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE PRAKARA OF THE KERE-BASTI AT THE SAME VILLAGE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© . śrīvītārāgāya namaḥ . śrīmatparamagaṁbhīrasyā
dvādāmōghalāṁchanaṁ . jīyāt trailōkyanāthasya sāsanaṁ janasāsanaṁ [. 1*]
śrīmaddēśigaṇē khyātē parasārāvalīśvaraḥ . yōbhūllalitakīrttyākhyasa
nmunīṁdrōpadēśakaḥ . 2 śrīmatsōmakulāṁbarasya taraṇiḥ śrījainadattā
nvayaḥ śrīmadbhairavarājapaṭṭabhaginīśrīcaṁdalāṁbāsutaḥ . śrīmadbhō
janarēṁdrasaṁnnibhayaśāḥ śrīpāṁḍyapruthvīpatiḥ śrīmajjainanikētanaṁ racita
vānnāmnā caturbbhadrakaṁ . 3 svasti śrīsakarājakālavigatē śailarttuvēdēṁdu
bhiḥ krōdhyabdhē subhalagnahōgakaraṇē māghē sitē turyyakē . vārē bhānusamābhi
dhānakarabhē śrīpāṁḍyabhūsvāminā śrīmadbhadranivāsamadhyajina
saukhyāya pratiṣṭhāpitā . [4 .*] 1467 . śakavarusa śaṁdadu krōdhisaṁva
tsarada māghaśuddha 4 ravivāradalu śrī caṁdaladēviyara kumāra Arirā
yagaṁḍaradhāvaṇi śrīvīrapāṁḍyappoḍeyarū kārakaḷada pāṁḍyanagari
yalū caturmmukhada bastiyanū kaṭṭisi pārisvanātha mukhyavāda nelemūra
ṟallū naḍava dēvapūjege sāśanāṁkitavāgi biṭṭa kṣētrada vivara . nalūru reṁjā
ḷada bāḷokkalasiddhāyadalū saluva varaha gadyāṇa ga 57r1 reṁjāḷa
da maṁjugoḷiya koḷaṁpilada bāḷiṁdalū saluva sidhāyada bage vara
ha gadyāṇa 25 kke Akki khaṁḍuga 166 hāne 20 . keḷagaḷa maleladakkaṁ bā
ḷasamasta Akki khaṁḍuga 75 A mēgaṇa mallilaralū baruva Akki khaṁḍuga
25matte beṭṭiṁdalū saluva Akki khaṁḍuga 132 Asthā yiṁda saluva siddhā
yada baddha varaha 12 ḍakkaṁ vaseya seṭṭi beṭṭina guttiṁdalū saluva Akki khaṁḍu
ga 120 Aṁtu Akki khaṁḍuga 518 hāne 20 Aṁttu varaha gadyāṇa 58ṛ . I dha
rmma sūryyacaṁdrādityaruḷa(ṁ)ntabara naḍaUdu . I dharmmakke Aḷupidavaru nē
mīsvaraguṁmaṭanātha pārisvanāthana bhi(ṁ)nnamāḍidōpādi . gaṁgevāranāsi
yalli kavileya koṁdōpādhi . yēḷu ghaṭṭadalliḷiva gōUgaḷa koṁdōpādi .
yidhanaḷupidavaru catussaṁghakke horagu . caṁdrasūryyara sākṣi śrī
Digital edition of SII 7.248 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
